# Pull Request

## What does this change?

A brief description of what's different.

## Why?

What problem does this solve, or what motivated the change?

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Added tests for new behavior
- [ ] Manually verified the relevant flow

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the style of the surrounding code
- [ ] I updated CHANGELOG.md if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] I updated the README if a flag, config, or command changed
- [ ] No unrelated formatting changes (those go in a separate PR)
